hooks.command: echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qP 'git commit.*-m.*(feat|fix)[:(]' && echo '[PO] feat/fix commit detected. Consider running /po review to check if any in-progress item AC is now satisfied.' || true
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.env|package-lock\.json|pnpm-lock\.yaml|secrets?\.yaml)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit sensitive or lock file' && exit 2 || exit 0

echo 'Key context: Agent fleet harness with 5 core agents (PO, SA, SM, memory-manager, platform-ops). Progressive autonomy (Crawl/Walk/Run/Fly). Compliance floor overrides all. See CLAUDE.md for details.' > /tmp/antfarm-compact-context.txt
echo '[PO] Specialist agent completed. Consider running /po review to incorporate findings into the backlog.' || true
echo '[PO] Session started. Run /po for a quick status overview: WIP state, next recommended item, and grooming needs.'

statusLine.command: PACE=$(grep -oP '(?<=Current Pace: \*\*)[^*]+' .claude/COLLABORATION.md 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "Pace: $PACE | /po for status"
